headline: UNH Q1 Deep Dive: AI Investment and Value-Based Care Drive UnitedHealth’s Strong Start
summary: Health insurance company UnitedHealth (NYSE:UNH) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 2% year on year to $111.7 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $7.23 per share was 9.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: UnitedHealth Group Just Signaled Its Turnaround Is Finally Here
summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) delivered its most convincing quarter in over a year on April 21, 2026, posting a 9.38% EPS beat and raising full-year guidance, sending shares up 6.96% on the day to close at $346.01. headline: How UNH Stock Is Trading Short-Term Margins For Long-Term Moats
summary: The Q1 2026 data reveals a strategic decoupling of UnitedHealth Group’s (UNH) primary business engines. The central insight is that the company is utilizing a recovered insurance business to fund a significant technological transformation within Optum. headline: Elevance perks up in 2026 though Medicare Advantage payout could ding profits
summary: The Indianapolis-based insurer raised its 2026 earnings guidance after posting a better first quarter than Wall Street expected. Still, Elevance expects it’ll have to pay the CMS around $935 million this year due to faulty MA data reporting.

content.title: Elevance perks up in 2026 though Medicare Advantage payout could ding profits
content.summary: The Indianapolis-based insurer raised its 2026 earnings guidance after posting a better first quarter than Wall Street expected. Still, Elevance expects it’ll have to pay the CMS around $935 million this year due to faulty MA data reporting.
